questions.prompt: When do we use the present continuous tense (现在进行时) in English?
options: To describe habits, facts, or actions that happen regularly.
To describe actions that are happening right now, at the moment of speaking.
To describe actions that were completed in the past.
To describe plans or predictions for the distant future.
questions.explanation: 现在进行时主要用于表示说话时正在进行或发生的动作，或者现阶段正在进行的临时性动作。
questions.hint: 表示“此时此刻正在发生”的动作。

questions.prompt: What is the basic structure of the present continuous tense in affirmative (肯定) sentences?
questions.explanation: 现在进行时肯定句的结构为：“主语 + be 动词 (am/is/are) + 动词的现在分词 (v-ing)”。两者缺一不可。
questions.hint: 不能丢掉 be 动词，也不能丢掉 动词词尾的 -ing。

questions.prompt: Which of the following v-ing spellings is incorrect?
questions.explanation: 以不发音的字母 -e 结尾的动词，变 v-ing 时要先去掉 -e 再加 -ing。因此 make 应变为 making，而不是 makeing。
questions.hint: 以不发音的 e 结尾的动词，去 e 加 ing。

questions.prompt: "Listen! Who ____ in the music room?" — "Oh, it's Emma. She is practising the piano."
questions.explanation: 听到“Listen!（听！）”说明唱歌的动作正在发生，应用现在进行时。主语 Who 视作单数，使用 is singing。
questions.hint: Listen! 或 Look! 是现在进行时非常典型的标志词。

questions.prompt: What is the correct negative form of the sentence: "They are playing basketball in the playground."
options: They don't playing basketball in the playground.
They are not playing basketball in the playground.
They not playing basketball in the playground.
They aren't play basketball in the playground.
questions.explanation: 现在进行时的否定句结构是在 be 动词（am/is/are）后面直接加 not，即“am/is/are + not + v-ing”。
questions.hint: 在 be 动词后面直接加 not 即可构成否定。

questions.prompt: Choose the correct verb forms: "My parents ____ at home right now. They ____ in the office."
questions.explanation: 主语 My parents 是复数，时间状语 right now 表明用现在进行时。否定用 aren't working，肯定用 are working。
questions.hint: 主语是复数父母，且有 right now，用 be (not) + v-ing 结构。

questions.prompt: For double-consonant verbs (like swim -> swimming), when do we double the last letter before adding -ing?
options: When the verb ends in any consonant.
When the verb is a short, single-syllable word ending in a consonant-vowel-consonant (CVC) pattern with a short vowel sound.
When the verb ends in a silent "-e".
We always double the last letter for all verbs.
questions.explanation: 当动词是重读闭音节（通常是单音节）并且词尾是“辅音字母 + 元音字母 + 辅音字母”结构时，需要双写词尾的辅音字母再加 -ing（如 run -> running, sit -> sitting, swim -> swimming）。
questions.hint: 短元音 + 辅音字母结尾的重读闭音节，双写辅音字母加 ing。

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Look! A group of birds ____ over the lake."
questions.explanation: “Look!”表示动作正在进行。主语 “A group of birds”（一群鸟）被视作一个单数整体，因此 be 动词用 is，选择 is flying。
questions.hint: A group of... 作主语时，谓语动词通常用单数形式。

questions.prompt: Which sentence contains a grammatical error?
options: We having a great time at the party right now.
He is not writing a letter at the moment.
They are standing close together to keep warm.
I am drawing a picture of a giraffe.
questions.explanation: A项中 We having... 漏掉了 be 动词 are。正确的句子应该是 We are having a great time...。其他三项结构均正确。
questions.hint: 进行时一定要有 be 动词 (am/is/are) + v-ing，检查是否漏写 be 动词。

questions.prompt: "Where is your father?" — "He ____ the dog in the garden."
questions.explanation: 根据问句“你爸爸在哪？”，答语表示他“正在”喂狗，用现在进行时 is feeding。
questions.hint: 根据上下文语境，动作正在进行，用 be + v-ing 结构。

questions.prompt: How do you turn the sentence "She is drawing a panda" into a Yes/No question?
questions.explanation: 现在进行时的一般疑问句结构是把 be 动词（am/is/are）提到句首，即“Be (Am/Is/Are) + 主语 + v-ing...?”。
questions.hint: 把 be 动词 is 移到主语 she 之前。

questions.prompt: "Are you having a phone conversation with Emma?" — "____. I am writing my homework."
questions.explanation: 根据答语后半句“我正在写作业”，说明前半句是非否定答语。对 Are you... 的进行时提问，否定回答用 No, I'm not。
questions.hint: 根据后文“我在写作业”得出否定回答，注意 be 动词的配合。

questions.prompt: "Is Tom looking for his pencil box?" — "____. He found it in his locker."
questions.explanation: 后句说“他在储物柜里找到了”，说明他“目前没有”在找了。对 Is Tom... 的提问进行否定回答为 No, he isn't。
questions.hint: 已经找到了，说明不再寻找了，用否定回答。

questions.prompt: "____ the elephants playing in the river?" — "Yes, they are. They love water."
questions.explanation: 主语 the elephants 是复数，且答语是 Yes, they are。所以问句的 be 动词用 Are。
questions.hint: 主语 the elephants 是复数名词，疑问句首用 Are。

questions.prompt: Choose the correct short answer to: "Are they study English now?" (Assume grammatical correction in question)
questions.explanation: 对于 are they v-ing 提问的进行时一般疑问句，简短的肯定回答是“Yes, they are.”。不能用 do 或 don't。
questions.hint: 进行时一般疑问句肯定简短回答：Yes, 主语 + be 动词。

questions.prompt: "____ you blind?" — "No, I am not. I can see clearly with my glasses."
questions.explanation: 此句中 blind 是形容词，主语是 you，系表结构的一般疑问句把 be 动词 Are 提到句首。不能用助动词 do 或情态动词 can。
questions.hint: blind（失明的）是形容词，需要与 be 动词搭配。

questions.prompt: "Is Sally wearing her school uniform today?" — "____. She has to wear it from Monday to Friday."
questions.explanation: 后句提到“周一到周五她不得不穿校服”，说明她今天“确实穿了”。所以用肯定回答 Yes, she is。
questions.hint: 依据后文不得不穿的规定，作肯定回答。

questions.prompt: Identify the incorrect dialogue:
options: A: Are the monkeys climbing the tree? - B: Yes, they are.
A: Is Chen Jie drawing a map? - B: No, she is.
A: Am I playing this game correctly? - B: Yes, you are.
A: Is the baby wolf sleeping? - B: No, it isn't.
questions.explanation: B项回答中，No 后面必须接否定，不能用 No, she is。应改为 No, she isn't 或 Yes, she is。
questions.hint: Yes 后面接肯定，No 后面接否定，检查前后是否一致。

questions.prompt: "____ the tiger sleeping under the tree?" — "No, it isn't. It is walking around."
questions.explanation: 主语 the tiger 是单数第三人称，且答语为 No, it isn't。所以疑问句首用 Is。
questions.hint: 主语 the tiger 是单数，be 动词用 is 提问。

questions.prompt: What is the correct structure of a negative Yes/No question in the present continuous?
questions.explanation: 现在进行时否定的一般疑问句结构是：“Be (Am/Is/Are) + 主语 + not + v-ing...?”（或者缩写形式 Aren't/Isn't + 主语 + v-ing...?）。
questions.hint: be 动词提到句首，not 放在主语之后，后接 v-ing。
